prompt: Draft a detailed in vitro transcription assay protocol for SARS-CoV-2 NSP12 RNA-dependent RNA polymerase (RdRp) complex with NSP7 and NSP8 co-factors, for antiviral compound screening. The protocol should include: (1) recombinant complex preparation: NSP12 (1 µM) pre-assembled with NSP7 (5 µM) and NSP8 (10 µM) in 20 mM HEPES pH 7.4, 100 mM NaCl, 5 mM MgCl2, 5% glycerol, (2) RNA template: 40-nt hairpin primer-template construct (5'-Cy3 labelled), (3) reaction conditions: 500 nM complex, 500 nM RNA, 500 µM NTPs, 37°C, 30 min, (4) compound testing: add candidate compound (1–1000 nM) before RNA addition, remdesivir-TP as positive control, (5) readout: Molecular Beacon fluorescence (FI/FI0 extension rate) or urea-PAGE band shift quantification, (6) IC50 determination. Include controls for NTP contamination and Mg2+ concentration optimisation.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05) and SARS-CoV-2 RdRp in vitro assay literature; target: NSP12 RdRp; organism: SARS-CoV-2; catalogue version v1.0

_provenance.target_name: SARS-CoV-2 NSP12 RdRp in vitro transcription assay
_provenance.target_class: betacoronavirus RNA-dependent RNA polymerase activity assay for antiviral screening
